tests.intent: All required ADB values and wallet inputs are supplied only through the environment or protected ephemeral files; absence, placeholder values, unsafe permissions, printing, retention, or repository presence fails closed as NOT RUN.

Live database and HTTP observations attest Oracle Autonomous Database 23ai or later and managed ORDS through hashed target/origin identities and independently captured request evidence; Oracle Free, local ORDS, proxy, replay, or dry-run evidence is rejected.

The cloud entrance capability SQL and complete transport installer, calls and teardown are byte-identical to reviewed local P0 sources, with immutable SHA-256 recorded before execution and no cloud-specific weakened copy or feature fallback.

Every required P0 Oracle feature executes a result-bearing live example against the target Autonomous Database, records exact reviewed result hashes, cleans its disposable objects, and treats unsupported, empty, errored, skipped, or partial probes as failure.

Every reviewed P0 AutoREST transport case passes unchanged through managed ORDS, including exact methods, names, JSON and BLOB representation, gzip, errors, rollback, CORS, preflight, maximum frame and largest asset without truncation or fallback.

SQLcl is exactly the locked version and applies one canonical ordered manifest containing the same schema, seed, engine and REST bytes as local; unpinned tools, network-installed tools, reordered scripts, retries, ignored SQL errors, substitutions or dry runs fail.

Live service queries record workload type, CPU/ECPU allocation, storage, autoscaling and database version, each within declared deployment policy and target limits; absent observations, unlimited claims, local container values or policy drift fail.

Live catalog evidence proves exact application roles, object grants and public execute policy with no DBA, SYS authority, ANY-object privilege, unlimited tablespace, evaluator grants, credential objects or unexpected administrative exposure.

Managed ORDS exposes exactly DOOM_API and PUBLIC_HEALTH under the reviewed schema alias with no custom modules, templates or handlers and no direct table, session-state, evaluator, fixture, golden, debug or administrative object exposure.

Every deployed package, type, view, trigger and other required object is present and VALID, constraints are enabled and validated, SQL errors are empty, expected object fingerprints match deployment output, and probe objects are absent after cleanup.

Freshly measured local and cloud canonical ledgers contain every reviewed seed domain exactly once with equal row or byte counts and lowercase SHA-256 hashes, including WAD geometry, acceleration, render assets, engine definitions and project RNG.

Every reviewed direct API family runs against the actual managed ORDS origin with real unpredictable session tokens and validates status, headers, gzip/RLE payloads, state transitions, assets, audio, history, completion, failures and CORS without browser or transport interception.

A canonical secret-free evidence record binds immutable script, deployment, catalog, seed, capability, transport and API observations to one hashed Autonomous target and managed ORDS origin, with atomic creation and content-addressed retained artifacts.

Timeouts, network errors, missing credentials, NOT RUN, SKIP, TODO, empty output, duplicate or absent cases, malformed hashes, stale ancestry, mutation survivors, evaluator edits, foundation failure or adversarial failure prevent T11.1 PASS.
